title: The 7 Churches of Revelation: Times of Fire
original_title: The 7 Churches of Revelation: Times of Fire
overview: An investigative filmmaker and global scholars examine the mysterious letters to the seven Churches of Revelation, the roots of persecution in the 1st Century Church, and the connections to our modern day lives.
